common.decryption_warning_body: Some fields are blank because the APP_KEY in this environment does not match the key used to encrypt the data. To fix this: set APP_KEY in .env to the same value as the environment where the data was originally stored.
common.decryption_warning_body_client: Some fields cannot be displayed at this time. Please contact us to review your account details.
cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.description: We use cookies necessary for session, cart and security (CSRF). We do not install third-party cookies for advertising in this action.
cookies.footer_note: You can accept to continue. For more information, consult the privacy policy of the person responsible for the site.
errors.not_found_body: The address does not exist or has moved.
errors.session_expired_body: Security session has expired (e.g. CSRF token). Reload the page or log in again.
errors.session_expired_toast: Session expired. Please log in again or reload.
errors.network: Could not connect to the server. Check the connection.
shop.faq.title: Frequently asked questions
shop.faq.empty: No questions have been published yet.
admin.products.discount_percent_help: Optional. 0–100. The list price is the base price; The customer pays the discounted price applied.
auth.forgot_intro: Enter your account email and we will send you a link to set a new password.
auth.forgot_sent: We've sent you a password recovery email.
auth.reset_missing_link: Invalid or incomplete link. Request a new reset email.
auth.reset_done: Your password has been updated. You can sign in now.
auth.verification_resent: A new confirmation email has been sent.
auth.verify_success_banner: Email verified. You can sign in.
auth.verify_email_page_intro: We sent a confirmation link to your address. Open it to activate your account and use orders and your full profile.
auth.verify_email_auto_notice: When your email is confirmed, we will take you to the next screen automatically.
register.verify_email_hint: After signing up we take you to a short screen to confirm your email before checkout.
profile.name: Name
checkout.confirm_message: Do you want to finalize the order?
checkout.payment.card_help: If your bank requests it, secure verification (3D Secure) will open.
checkout.payment.paypal_help: Press the PayPal button and checkout on the screen that PayPal opens (often a pop-up window or overlay over the store; if your browser blocks pop-ups, it may open full screen). If it does not ask you for a username and password, it is usually because you already had a PayPal session in this browser; Check that the status of the order becomes paid. The charge is only confirmed when PayPal allows the capture after that step.
checkout.payment.redirecting_gateway: Redirecting to the secure payment gateway…
shop.order.payment_return_ko: Payment has not been completed. You can try again.
shop.order.paypal_window_hint: If PayPal is opened in another tab, complete your payment there or try again from this page.
shop.order.paypal_return_check: If you have completed payment on PayPal, your order status will be updated shortly. If not, please try the payment again.
checkout.payment_after_quote: Payment will be made when you are informed of the installation price.
checkout.installation_custom_quote_notic: If the total of products exceeds €1,000 (without shipping or installation), we will prepare a personalized installation quote and send it to you by mail.
checkout.installation_tier_notice: The installation fee follows sections according to the total number of products (without shipping); The payment will include this amount.
checkout.payment.paypal_missing_credenti: PayPal is not listed because valid credentials are missing in the .env: PAYPAL_CLIENT_ID (long string, ~80 characters, from the Sandbox/Live panel) and PAYPAL_SECRET. After correcting them, run php artisan config:clear.
checkout.payment.stripe_missing_credenti: Stripe is not available: define STRIPE_KEY and STRIPE_SECRET in .env, STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET for webhooks, and run php artisan config:clear. Payment is made on the Stripe hosted page (redirection); the “paid” status is confirmed by the webhook on the server.
checkout.payment.revolut_missing_credent: Revolut is not available: define REVOLUT_MERCHANT_API_KEY in .env (and REVOLUT_SANDBOX depending on environment), then php artisan config:clear. Payment is completed on the Revolut hosted page (redirection).
checkout.payment.config_load_error: Payment settings could not be loaded. Please try again or refresh the page.
checkout.payment.no_methods: No payment method is configured on the server. Contact the store or review the administration documentation.
checkout.payment.simulated_mode_notice: Development mode: Payments are marked as simulated only for methods without gateway credentials on the server; If you have PayPal (or another PSP) set up, the actual gateway will be used.
checkout.payment.local_debug_hint: On local, put APP_DEBUG=true in .env and make sure APP_ENV=local to enable simulated payments without Stripe/PayPal keys (or set PAYMENTS_ALLOW_SIMULATED=true). Then run php artisan config:clear.
shop.payment.method_unavailable: This payment method is not available. The administrator must configure the gateway on the server.
shop.payment.paypal_popup_blocked: The browser has blocked the new window. Click the link below to open PayPal in another tab.
shop.payment.paypal_not_completed: Payment with PayPal has not been completed. You can try again.
shop.order.payment_no_methods: There is no payment gateway configured. Online payment cannot be completed until at least one provider (Stripe, Redsys or Revolut) is activated.
shop.order.payment_how_it_works: When everything is set up, the card is entered here (Stripe), Bizum and Redsys redirect to the bank's POS, and Revolut opens your payment on another page.
shop.checkout.requires_login: You must log in to complete the order.
shop.custom_solution.success: Request sent. We will be in touch soon. Please check your email.
shop.custom_solution.saved_portal: You will receive a secure link to manage the request along with the confirmation message.
shop.client_portal.title: Your request
shop.client_portal.improvement_hint: Explain what you want to adjust; the team will receive it.
shop.client_portal.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this request? This action cannot be undone.
shop.client_portal.pay_login_hint: Log in with the same email you used in the application to complete the payment.
shop.catalog.scroll_for_more: Scroll down to load more products.
shop.cart.psp_checkout_in_progress: You have a payment in progress. Complete it or wait for it to expire before changing your cart.
shop.cart.installation_quote_hint: Installation: rates for sections up to €1,000 of products; Above, personalized quote.
shop.cart.installation_quote_only_hint: With products over €1,000 (without shipping or installation), the team will prepare an installation quote and contact you by email.
shop.cart.installation_tiers_hint: Rates according to total products (without shipping or installation): up to €250 → €90; €251–500 → €120; €501–1,000 → €180. Above €1,000 a budget is required.
shop.cart.keys_all_same_tooltip: Select if you want all keys in the package to be exactly the same.
shop.favorites.title: Favorites
shop.favorites.empty: You have not saved any favorites yet.
shop.favorites.verify_required: Verify your email to use favorites.
shop.purchases.empty: There are no purchases to show.
shop.order.no_lines: There are no lines on this order.
shop.order.awaiting_installation_quote: You have requested installation. The price will be confirmed by mail; Until then you cannot pay.
shop.order.cannot_pay_yet: This order cannot be paid yet.
shop.order.waive_installation: Cancel installation request and pay only for products
shop.order.waive_installation_hint: If you no longer want installation, you can continue without this service (only while we wait for the quote).
shop.order.awaiting_payment_notice: The payment has not been completed yet. You can try the payment again from here.
shop.order.tracker.invite_browse: All your orders are complete. Discover new products!
shop.search.try_different: Use different keywords and try again.
shop.no_products: Right now there are no products.
shop.featured_empty: There are no featured products right now.
validation.phone: Enter a valid phone number (minimum 6 digits).
validation.postal_digits: Postal code must contain digits only (up to 20).
validation.password_min: The password must be at least 8 characters.

admin.about.title: About
admin.about.stack_backend: Laravel, PHP 8.2+, REST API under /api/v1, session auth for customers and admin guard for staff, Sanctum where applicable.
admin.about.stack_frontend: React, Vite, Tailwind CSS 4, daisyUI 5, i18n (Catalan, Spanish, English).
admin.about.stack_data: Database: MySQL, MariaDB, PostgreSQL, or SQLite depending on environment; Eloquent, migrations, and seeders.
admin.about.stack_payments: Payment gateways: Stripe (card), PayPal, and simulated checkout in development; webhooks and order completion.

admin.settings.title: Shop configuration
admin.settings.index_columns_subtitle: Column visibility and order on admin tables.
admin.settings.index_columns_order_hint: Toggle each column on or off and use the side control to reorder (table column order).
admin.settings.section_home_subtitle: Trending rules, home featured limits, and recalculate from the toolbar.
admin.settings.featured_max_hint: 0 means no limit per group. Manual featured first, then low-stock trending, then overstock trending; random order within each group when limited.
admin.settings.low_stock_enabled: Highlight products at or below the stock threshold
admin.settings.blacklist_enabled: Exclude listed product IDs from this rule
admin.settings.blacklist_ids_hint: Product IDs, separated by commas or spaces
admin.settings.overstock_enabled: Highlight products at or above the stock threshold
admin.settings.overstock_blacklist_enabl: Exclude listed product IDs from this rule
admin.settings.section_personalized_subt: Allow or block new requests from the storefront.
admin.settings.accept_personalized_solut: Accept new custom solution requests from the storefront
admin.settings.section_list_defaults_hel: Default time period applied when opening the Orders and Custom Solutions lists.
admin.settings.section_closed_prices_hel: Default shipping, automatic installation brackets, and future postal rules.
admin.settings.shipping_flat_help: Flat rate applied to new checkouts and shown in the cart; each order stores its own amount.
admin.settings.installation_auto_help: When installation is requested, the fee is picked from the first tier whose ceiling is greater than or equal to the cart merchandise subtotal. Above the quote threshold, the flow asks for a manual quote.
admin.settings.installation_tiers_hint: Tiers must have strictly increasing merchandise ceilings. The last tier ceiling must equal the quote threshold so automatic pricing covers all merchandise up to that limit.
admin.settings.installation_tier_mismatc: The last tier ceiling should match the quote threshold (EUR). Adjust them before saving.
admin.settings.shipping_postal_not_imple: Not implemented yet. Rates by postal code will be configurable here later.
admin.settings.section_terms_subtitle: Editable legal text per language shown on the /terms page of the shop.
admin.settings.terms_help: Write the content as plain text. Separate paragraphs with a blank line. If a language is left empty, the page will display a neutral message.
admin.settings.terms_placeholder: Write the terms and conditions text here…
admin.products.is_trending_managed_by_se: This flag is updated from Configuration using stock rules and “Recalculate automatic highlights”.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.empty: Terms and conditions have not been configured yet.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1_body: Serralleria Solidària, registered address: [address], Catalonia, Spain.
privacy.s2_intro: We collect only the data strictly necessary for the stated purposes.
privacy.s2_1_body: Email address, encrypted password, and account type (individual/company).
privacy.s2_2_body: Name, surname, and official identifier (DNI, NIE, or CIF) for invoicing purposes.
privacy.s2_3_body: Phone number(s) and additional email addresses provided in your profile.
privacy.s2_4_body: Delivery and/or installation addresses (street, city, province, postal code).
privacy.s2_5_body: Order contents, dates, prices, shipping details, and order status.
privacy.s2_6_body: Payment method (card/PayPal), gateway transaction references. We do not store full card numbers — card data is processed exclusively by Stripe or PayPal.
privacy.s2_7_body: Problem description, resolution notes, improvement feedback, and any files you upload. This may include details about your property or equipment.
privacy.s2_8_body: IP address, browser/device type, and session data collected automatically for security and fraud prevention.
privacy.s2_9_body: Product review comments, return request reasons, and any messages sent through the platform.
privacy.s3_intro: The legal basis for each processing purpose is listed below (references to GDPR Art. 6).
privacy.s4_intro: We keep personal data only as long as necessary for the stated purpose or as required by law.
privacy.s5_intro: We share personal data only with the third parties strictly necessary to deliver our services:
privacy.s5_email_provider: Email delivery provider (transactional emails: order confirmations, password resets).
privacy.s5_note: We do not sell personal data. New sub-processors will be listed here when introduced.
privacy.s6_intro: We apply appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect your personal data:
privacy.s6_encryption: Official identifiers (DNI/CIF/NIE) and sensitive fields encrypted at rest.
privacy.s6_passwords: Passwords stored as bcrypt/Argon2 hashes — never in plain text.
privacy.s6_access: Role-based database access control; staff access to raw PII is logged and limited.
privacy.s6_sessions: Session expiry and IP logging for fraud prevention.
privacy.s7_intro: Under GDPR and the Spanish LOPDGDD, you have the following rights:
privacy.s7_access: Right of access: request a copy of all personal data we hold about you.
privacy.s7_rectification: Right to rectification: correct inaccurate or incomplete data.
privacy.s7_erasure: Right to erasure ('right to be forgotten'): request deletion of your data, subject to legal retention obligations.
privacy.s7_restriction: Right to restriction: limit how we process your data in certain circumstances.
privacy.s7_portability: Right to data portability: receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format.
privacy.s7_object: Right to object: object to processing based on legitimate interest.
privacy.s7_withdraw_consent: Right to withdraw consent: withdraw marketing consent at any time without affecting past processing.
privacy.s7_contact_text: To exercise any of these rights, contact us at:
privacy.s7_aepd: You may also lodge a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Authority (AEPD):
privacy.s8_body: We do not use automated decision-making or profiling that produces legal or similarly significant effects on you.
privacy.s9_body: Stripe and PayPal may process payment data in the United States. Both operate under Standard Contractual Clauses or other approved transfer mechanisms in accordance with GDPR Chapter V. No other international transfers take place.
privacy.s10_body: We may update this policy from time to time. Material changes will be notified by email or a prominent notice on the site. The version date at the top of this page always reflects the latest update.
gdpr.notice_register: Your data will be used to create and manage your account. Legal basis: contract performance (GDPR Art. 6.1.b). Official ID is retained for 5 years for tax purposes.
gdpr.notice_checkout: Your address and payment reference will be used to process and deliver your order. Legal basis: contract performance (GDPR Art. 6.1.b). Order data is retained for 7 years for legal compliance.
gdpr.notice_custom_solution: Your contact and address data will be used to manage and deliver your custom service request. Legal basis: contract performance / legitimate interest (GDPR Art. 6.1.b/f). Retained for 3 years after service completion.
gdpr.accept_privacy: I have read and accept the Privacy Policy
gdpr.accept_privacy_prefix: I have read and accept the
gdpr.accept_marketing: I agree to receive commercial communications and promotions (optional)
gdpr.field_hint_identification: Required by law to issue invoices (DNI, NIE or CIF). Stored encrypted. Retained for 5 years for tax obligations.
gdpr.field_hint_phone: Used to contact you about your order or service visit. Optional for purchases that do not require installation.
gdpr.field_hint_address: Used to coordinate the service visit or deliver your order. Not shared with third parties beyond the delivery carrier.
